label: stabilize and transfer
notes: Acute cases may be stabilized locally before air transfer to specialty centers.

label: regional specialty care
notes: Transport layer connects Crescent City to out-of-county tertiary care.

label: primary-to-acute referral
notes: FQHC and hospital functions are separate but linked through referral and emergency pathways.

label: benefits and public health coordination
notes: Tribal and county services overlap around eligibility public health household support and victim services.

label: food housing behavioral health support
notes: County safety-net work depends on community partners nonprofit service channels food-system partners and domestic-violence resources.

label: navigation into routine care
notes: Mutual aid and social services help residents reach routine care before emergencies.

label: ground travel constraint
notes: Long distances and Last Chance Grade vulnerability make transportation part of healthcare capacity.
